column14: HFC Comments: Control Condition: cicMeasurement Section Codition: bWeather Condition: sunyWind Velocity: 10Wind Direction: DS Cold conditions, measurement was not very good, first meter electrical connection continued to spin, beeper worked well out of water, believe there was zero low in the first few holes but I changed meter because I started to second guess the meter after the third 0revs/40secs hole, however trend continued into the next few holes. However I believe I undermeasured today, if weather wasn't so cold, pilot would have left us for fuel, due to temps pilot stayed so we had a bit more of a time crunch, no additional holes were drilled, due to this. Partial ice cover.  River width of 78m measured by range finder, matches previous widths at similar levels. Interpretted area from stage/area curve of discharge measurements at similar water level. Area=173m2. Subtracted ice area based on March 16, 2017 ice measurement. ice area =36.7m2. Timed drifting ice velocities and averaged results to obtain a mean velocity of .924m/s. .924m/s x 136m2 = 126m3/s estimate discharge. Sources:Manual
